label: fabricated
reason: The document cites a future Federal Register volume and date, uses a non-standard EPA rule numbering format, and describes an extraordinarily permissive wetland-filling exemption with no basis in any known rulemaking proceeding.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains numerous hallmarks of fabrication: it cites a future Federal Register volume (91 Fed. Reg.) and date (February 2026) that has not yet been published, the rule number format "2026-03" does not match EPA's actual rulemaking numbering conventions, and the substance—allowing filling of up to 1 acre of wetlands with no Corps notification—would represent an extraordinary rollback of Clean Water Act protections with no basis in any known rulemaking proceeding.
